timestamp after which the next update is permitted"}}],"ERC721IncorrectOwner(address,uint256,address)":[{"details":"Indicates an error related to the ownership over a particular token. Used in transfers.","params":{"owner":"Address of the current owner of a token.","sender":"Address whose tokens are being transferred.","tokenId":"Identifier number of a token."}}],"ERC721InsufficientApproval(address,uint256)":[{"details":"Indicates a failure with the `operator`\u2019s approval. Used in transfers.","params":{"operator":"Address that may be allowed to operate on tokens without being their owner.","tokenId":"Identifier number of a token."}}],"ERC721InvalidApprover(address)":[{"details":"Indicates a failure with the `approver` of a token to be approved. Used in approvals.","params":{"approver":"Address initiating an approval operation."}}],"ERC721InvalidOperator(address)":[{"details":"Indicates a failure with the `operator` to be approved. Used in approvals.","params":{"operator":"Address that may be allowed to operate on tokens without being their owner."}}],"ERC721InvalidOwner(address)":[{"details":"Indicates that an address can't be an owner. Used in balance queries.","params":{"owner":"Address of the current owner of a token."}}],"ERC721InvalidReceiver(address)":[{"details":"Indicates a failure with the token `receiver`. Used in transfers.","params":{"receiver":"Address to which tokens are being transferred."}}],"ERC721InvalidSender(address)":[{"details":"Indicates a failure with the token `sender`. Used in transfers.","params":{"sender":"Address whose tokens are being transferred."}}],"ERC721NonexistentToken(uint256)":[{"details":"Indicates a `tokenId` whose `owner` is the zero address.","params":{"tokenId":"Identifier number of a token."}}],"OwnableInvalidOwner(address)":[{"details":"The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)"}],"OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address)":[{"details":"The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation."}]},"events":{"Approval(address,address,uint256)":{"details":"Emitted when `owner` enables `approved` to manage the `tokenId` token."},"ApprovalForAll(address,address,bool)":{"details":"Emitted when `owner` enables or disables (`approved`) `operator` to manage all of its assets."},"ScoreUpdated(address,uint16,uint8,bool)":{"params":{"newScore":"The new raw credit score (0\u20131000)","tier":"The derived tier (0=Unverified, 1=Bronze, 2=Silver, 3=Gold)","wallet":"The wallet address whose score changed","zkVerified":"Whether the score update was backed by a ZK proof"}},"Transfer(address,address,uint256)":{"details":"Emitted when `tokenId` token is transferred from `from` to `to`."}},"kind":"dev","methods":{"approve(address,uint256)":{"details":"Gives permission to `to` to transfer `tokenId` token to another account. The approval is cleared when the token is transferred. Only a single account can be approved at a time, so approving the zero address clears previous approvals. Requirements: - The caller must own the token or be an approved operator. - `tokenId` must exist. Emits an {Approval} event."},"balanceOf(address)":{"details":"Returns the number of tokens in ``owner``'s account."},"constructor":{"params":{"_oracle":"The initial oracle address authorised to mint/update","initialOwner":"The address that will own this contract (via Ownable)"}},"getApproved(uint256)":{"details":"Returns the account approved for `tokenId` token. Requirements: - `tokenId` must exist."},"getScore(address)":{"params":{"wallet":"The wallet address to query"},"returns":{"score":"     Raw credit score (0\u20131000)","tier":"      Derived tier (0=Unverified, 1=Bronze, 2=Silver, 3=Gold)","zkVerified":"Whether the most recent update was ZK-verified"}},"getTier(uint16)":{"details":"Pure function \u2014 no state reads required.         Tier boundaries:           0 = Unverified  (score <  300)           1 = Bronze      (300 <= score < 600)           2 = Silver      (600 <= score < 800)           3 = Gold        (score >= 800)","params":{"score":"Raw credit score to evaluate"},"returns":{"tier":"The corresponding tier index"}},"getTokenId(address)":{"details":"Returns 0 if the wallet has never been minted a token         (token IDs start at 1).","params":{"wallet":"The wallet address to query"},"returns":{"_0":"The token ID owned by `wallet`, or 0 if none"}},"isApprovedForAll(address,address)":{"details":"Returns if the `operator` is allowed to manage all of the assets of `owner`. See {setApprovalForAll}"},"mintScore(address)":{"details":"Only callable by the authorised oracle.         Reverts if `to` already owns a token.","params":{"to":"The wallet that will receive the soul-bound token"},"returns":{"tokenId":"The token ID that was minted"}},"name()":{"details":"Returns the token collection name."},"owner()":{"details":"Returns the address of the current owner."},"ownerOf(uint256)":{"details":"Returns the owner of the `tokenId` token. Requirements: - `tokenId` must exist."},"renounceOwnership()":{"details":"Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner."},"safeTransferFrom(address,address,uint256)":{"details":"Safely transfers `tokenId` token from `from` to `to`, checking first that contract recipients are aware of the ERC-721 protocol to prevent tokens from being forever locked. Requirements: - `from` cannot be the zero address. - `to` cannot be the zero address. - `tokenId` token must exist and be owned by `from`. - If the caller is not `from`, it must have been allowed to move this token by either {approve} or   {setApprovalForAll}. - If `to` refers to a smart contract, it must implement {IERC721Receiver-onERC721Received}, which is called upon   a safe transfer. Emits a {Transfer} event."},"safeTransferFrom(address,address,uint256,bytes)":{"details":"Block safeTransferFrom (4-arg variant with data).      In OZ v5, the 3-arg safeTransferFrom is a non-virtual final function      that delegates here, so overriding this single function is sufficient      to block all safe-transfer paths."},"setApprovalForAll(address,bool)":{"details":"Approve or remove `operator` as an operator for the caller. Operators can call {transferFrom} or {safeTransferFrom} for any token owned by the caller. Requirements: - The `operator` cannot be the address zero. Emits an {ApprovalForAll} event."},"setOracle(address)":{"params":{"newOracle":"Address of the new oracle"}},"supportsInterface(bytes4)":{"details":"Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See the corresponding https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165#how-interfaces-are-identified[ERC section] to learn more about how these ids are created. This function call must use less than 30 000 gas."},"symbol()":{"details":"Returns the token collection symbol."},"transferFrom(address,address,uint256)":{"details":"Block all ERC-721 transfers; soul-bound tokens cannot move."},"transferOwnership(address)":{"details":"Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner."},"updateScore(uint256,uint16,bool)":{"details":"Only callable by the authorised oracle.         Enforces a 24-hour cooldown between updates (CooldownNotExpired).","params":{"newScore":"New raw credit score in the range [0, 1000]","tokenId":"The token whose score should be updated","zkVerified":"Whether this update is accompanied by a valid ZK proof"}}},"title":"CreditScoreNFT","version":1},"userdoc":{"errors":{"CooldownNotExpired(uint64)":[{"notice":"Thrown when a score update is attempted before the cooldown expires"}],"SoulBoundToken()":[{"notice":"Thrown when an attempt is made to transfer a soul-bound token"}],"UnauthorizedOracle()":[{"notice":"Thrown when a caller that is not the authorised oracle attempts a         privileged action (mint or update)"}]},"events":{"ScoreUpdated(address,uint16,uint8,bool)":{"notice":"Emitted whenever a credit score is updated on a token"},"ScoreUpdated(address,uint256,uint16,uint8,bool)":{"notice":"Emitted when a credit score is updated"}},"kind":"user","methods":{"UPDATE_COOLDOWN()":{"notice":"Minimum time between score updates for a single token"},"getScore(address)":{"notice":"Retrieve the current credit profile for a given wallet"},"getTier(uint16)":{"notice":"Derive the tier from an arbitrary score value"},"getTokenId(address)":{"notice":"Look up the token ID associated with a wallet"},"mintScore(address)":{"notice":"Mint a new credit-score NFT to `to`"},"oracle()":{"notice":"The oracle address authorised to mint and update scores"},"setOracle(address)":{"notice":"Update the authorised oracle address"},"tokenURI(uint256)":{"notice":"Returns a fully on-chain base64-encoded JSON metadata string         including an SVG image that reflects the token's credit profile."},"updateScore(uint256,uint16,bool)":{"notice":"Update the credit score stored on an existing token"},"walletToTokenId(address)":{"notice":"Maps a wallet address to its token ID (0 means no token)"}},"notice":"Soul-bound ERC-721 that stores on-chain credit scores for CreditLayer.         Each wallet may hold exactly one token. Scores are updated exclusively         by the authorised oracle and enforce a 24-hour cooldown between updates.         Transfers are permanently disabled \u2014 the token is non-transferable.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/CreditScoreNFT.sol":"CreditScoreNFT"},"evmVersion":"cancun","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":@chainlink/=lib/chainlink/contracts/",":@openzeppelin/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/",":erc4626-tests/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/erc4626-tests/",":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/",":halmos-cheatcodes/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/halmos-cheatcodes/src/",":openzeppelin-contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/access/Ownable.sol":{"keccak256":"0xff6d0bb2e285473e5311d9d3caacb525ae3538a80758c10649a4d61029b017bb","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://8ed324d3920bb545059d66ab97d43e43ee85fd3bd52e03e401f020afb0b120f6","dweb:/ipfs/QmfEckWLmZkDDcoWrkEvMWhms66xwTLff9DDhegYpvHo1a"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/interfaces/draft-IERC6093.sol":{"keccak256":"0x1b88b3fb3d85ba5496d7d5f396f83ee1fddcdd6762059ff65992655b67920998","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://89393bb3212da1c0889601b9706a07b39419ddc4d2faab9eaf6e7f9152cf6a1c","dweb:/ipfs/QmcCfzzxv1Bkdz1c1yF4gQCeYb6Us5BJANnzTFqawfd1HL"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/token/ERC721/ERC721.sol":{"keccak256":"0xf6bb0dc431a9c50e25756412ec14cfcd4dc61dd40b8dc0e1b58ec09fce6d5564","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://eb87fef7e8ed754b8600cd5d42e4f23128059006368ffd19e4d50cc166471ee5","dweb:/ipfs/Qmc1vy1cevKreGUsG7S79gyhNvDtPnNz9qG47eYVHmMKLs"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/token/ERC721/IERC721.sol":{"keccak256":"0xf78f05f3b8c9f75570e85300d7b4600d7f6f6a198449273f31d44c1641adb46f","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://e28b872613b45e0e801d4995aa4380be2531147bfe2d85c1d6275f1de514fba3","dweb:/ipfs/QmeeFcfShHYaS3BdgVj78nxR28ZaVUwbvr66ud8bT6kzw9"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/token/ERC721/IERC721Receiver.sol":{"keccak256":"0x88cd5e3bee2e8c36b8d9058fbcaa81ad5704281b25634122234b55ea853d8055","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://8d approve(address,uint256).details: Gives permission to `to` to transfer `tokenId` token to another account. The approval is cleared when the token is transferred. Only a single account can be approved at a time, so approving the zero address clears previous approvals. Requirements: - The caller must own the token or be an approved operator. - `tokenId` must exist. Emits an {Approval} event.

balanceOf(address).details: Returns the number of tokens in ``owner``'s account.

params._oracle: The initial oracle address authorised to mint/update
params.initialOwner: The address that will own this contract (via Ownable)

getApproved(uint256).details: Returns the account approved for `tokenId` token. Requirements: - `tokenId` must exist.

returns.zkVerified: Whether the most recent update was ZK-verified

getTier(uint16).details: Pure function — no state reads required.         Tier boundaries:           0 = Unverified  (score <  300)           1 = Bronze      (300 <= score < 600)           2 = Silver      (600 <= score < 800)           3 = Gold        (score >= 800)

getTokenId(address).details: Returns 0 if the wallet has never been minted a token         (token IDs start at 1).

returns._0: The token ID owned by `wallet`, or 0 if none

isApprovedForAll(address,address).details: Returns if the `operator` is allowed to manage all of the assets of `owner`. See {setApprovalForAll}

mintScore(address).details: Only callable by the authorised oracle.         Reverts if `to` already owns a token.

params.to: The wallet that will receive the soul-bound token

returns.tokenId: The token ID that was minted

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

ownerOf(uint256).details: Returns the owner of the `tokenId` token. Requirements: - `tokenId` must exist.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

safeTransferFrom(address,address,uint256.details: Safely transfers `tokenId` token from `from` to `to`, checking first that contract recipients are aware of the ERC-721 protocol to prevent tokens from being forever locked. Requirements: - `from` cannot be the zero address. - `to` cannot be the zero address. - `tokenId` token must exist and be owned by `from`. - If the caller is not `from`, it must have been allowed to move this token by either {approve} or   {setApprovalForAll}. - If `to` refers to a smart contract, it must implement {IERC721Receiver-onERC721Received}, which is called upon   a safe transfer. Emits a {Transfer} event.

Block safeTransferFrom (4-arg variant with data).      In OZ v5, the 3-arg safeTransferFrom is a non-virtual final function      that delegates here, so overriding this single function is sufficient      to block all safe-transfer paths.

setApprovalForAll(address,bool).details: Approve or remove `operator` as an operator for the caller. Operators can call {transferFrom} or {safeTransferFrom} for any token owned by the caller. Requirements: - The `operator` cannot be the address zero. Emits an {ApprovalForAll} event.

supportsInterface(bytes4).details: Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See the corresponding https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165#how-interfaces-are-identified[ERC section] to learn more about how these ids are created. This function call must use less than 30 000 gas.

transferFrom(address,address,uint256).details: Block all ERC-721 transfers; soul-bound tokens cannot move.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

updateScore(uint256,uint16,bool).details: Only callable by the authorised oracle.         Enforces a 24-hour cooldown between updates (CooldownNotExpired).

params.newScore: New raw credit score in the range [0, 1000]
params.tokenId: The token whose score should be updated
params.zkVerified: Whether this update is accompanied by a valid ZK proof

UPDATE_COOLDOWN().notice: Minimum time between score updates for a single token

getScore(address).notice: Retrieve the current credit profile for a given wallet

getTier(uint16).notice: Derive the tier from an arbitrary score value

getTokenId(address).notice: Look up the token ID associated with a wallet

mintScore(address).notice: Mint a new credit-score NFT to `to`

oracle().notice: The oracle address authorised to mint and update scores

tokenURI(uint256).notice: Returns a fully on-chain base64-encoded JSON metadata string         including an SVG image that reflects the token's credit profile.

updateScore(uint256,uint16,bool).notice: Update the credit score stored on an existing token

walletToTokenId(address).notice: Maps a wallet address to its token ID (0 means no token)
